# Pull Request Template

## Description

Provide a clear, concise description of the changes in this PR.

## Type of Change

- [ ] New tool implementation
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Script enhancement
- [ ] Template update
- [ ] Infrastructure/CI changes

## Changes

List the major changes introduced by this PR:

- Add/update file X
- Modify script Y to handle Z scenario
- Document new procedure for ...

## Testing

Describe how this change was tested:

- [ ] Manual testing with dry-run mode
- [ ] Ran script against test cluster/environment
- [ ] Verified documentation renders correctly
- [ ] Linted and type-checked (if applicable)

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read and followed the [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) guidelines
- [ ] This PR follows the repository's [documentation standards](../00_index/topics.md)
- [ ] All scripts include dry-run mode where appropriate
- [ ] I have updated the [CHANGELOG](../CHANGELOG.md)
- [ ] This PR includes updates to `00_index/quick-links.md` if new docs/tools were added
- [ ] I have tested that my changes do not break existing functionality

## Additional Notes

Any additional information for reviewers, such as screenshots, logs, or references to related issues/PRs.

## Related Issues

List any related issues by number or link.
